title: Rufus Workflow Registry
description: JSON Schema for Rufus workflow registry YAML files.

workflows.description: List of all available workflows in this registry.

type.description: Workflow type identifier. Must match workflow_type in the config file.

config_file.description: Path to the workflow YAML file, relative to registry location.

initial_state_model.description: Python import path to the Pydantic state model for this workflow.

requires.description: Optional list of external rufus-* packages required for this workflow.

deprecated.description: If true, this workflow version is deprecated and should not be used for new instances.

successor.description: If deprecated, the workflow type that supersedes this one.
